testCase.name: sort-optimized.yml
steps: Check if current page shows Swag Labs and user is logged in
If not logged in or not on correct page, navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/
If login form is visible, fill username field with standard_user
If login form is visible, fill password field with secret_sauce
If login form is visible, click login button
Verify page displays Swag Labs and user is logged in
Check if current page is the products page (inventory.html)
If not on products page, navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com//inventory.html
Verify page displays Products and product list
Click sorting dropdown, select Price(low to high)
Click sorting dropdown, select Price(high to low)

steps.step: Sort by price low to high
Sort by price high to low

validations: Low to high sorting verified: $7.99 (Sauce Labs Onesie)
High to low sorting verified: $49.99 (Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket)
